metadata.description: Large current-format payload from the Zomato delivery dataset for showing weather-based safety filtering without relying on the dataset's distance field.
metadata.name: Zomato Severe Weather Large (288 orders)
metadata.recommended_for: Weather safety rule demos, rejection diagnostics, and severe-condition allocation review at larger scale.
metadata.scenario: Large severe-weather slice generated from Stormy and Sandstorms Zomato rows.
